## Goal

What should this campaign task accomplish?

## Dungeon or chapter

Example: Deadmines, Wailing Caverns, Shadowfang Keep

## Requirements

- Short readable quest text
- Clear lore connection
- Clear player objective
- No unnecessary custom systems unless needed

## Deliverable

Which file should be created or updated?

Example:

campaign/02-deadmines.md
